response_body_utf8: {"version":"6.9","hitCount":1,"request":{"queryString":"EXT_ID:36826966 AND SRC:MED","internalQuery":"EXT_ID:36826966 AND SRC:MED","resultType":"CORE","cursorMark":"*","pageSize":5,"sort":"","synonym":false},"resultList":{"result":[{"id":"36826966","source":"MED","pmid":"36826966","pmcid":"PMC9960256","fullTextIdList":{"fullTextId":["PMC9960256"]},"doi":"10.3390/jimaging9020047","title":"Spectral Reflectance Estimation from Camera Responses Using Local Optimal Dataset.","authorString":"Tominaga S, Sakai H.","authorList":{"author":[{"fullName":"Tominaga S","firstName":"Shoji","lastName":"Tominaga","initials":"S","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Department of Computer Science, Norwegian University of Science and Technology, 2815 Gjøvik, Norway."},{"affiliation":"Department of Business and Informatics, Nagano University, Ueda 386-0032, Japan."}]}},{"fullName":"Sakai H","firstName":"Hideaki","lastName":"Sakai","initials":"H","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Professor Emeritus, Kyoto University, Kyoto 606-8501, Japan."}]}}]},"dataLinksTagsList":{"dataLinkstag":["altmetrics"]},"journalInfo":{"issue":"2","volume":"9","journalIssueId":3512604,"dateOfPublication":"2023 Feb","monthOfPublication":2,"yearOfPublication":2023,"printPublicationDate":"2023-02-01","journal":{"title":"Journal of imaging","medlineAbbreviation":"J Imaging","issn":"2313-433X","nlmid":"101698819","isoabbreviation":"J Imaging","essn":"2313-433X"}},"pubYear":"2023","pageInfo":"47","abstractText":"A novel method is proposed to estimate surface-spectral reflectance from camera responses using a local optimal reflectance dataset. We adopt a multispectral imaging system that involves an RGB camera capturing multiple images under multiple light sources. A spectral reflectance database is utilized to locally determine the candidates to optimally estimate the spectral reflectance. The proposed estimation method comprises two stages: (1) selecting the local optimal reflectance dataset and (2) determining the best estimate using only the local optimal dataset. In (1), the camera responses are predicted for the respective reflectances in the database, and then the prediction errors are calculated to select the local optimal dataset. In (2), multiple methods are used; in particular, the Wiener and linear minimum mean square error estimators are used to calculate all statistics, based only on the local optimal dataset, and linear and quadratic programming methods are used to solve optimization problems with constraints. Experimental results using different mobile phone cameras show that the estimation accuracy has improved drastically. A much smaller local optimal dataset among spectral reflectance databases is enough to obtain the optimal estimates. The method has potential applications including fields of color science, image science and technology, computer vision, and graphics.","affiliation":"Department of Computer Science, Norwegian University of Science and Technology, 2815 Gjøvik, Norway.","publicationStatus":"epublish","language":"eng","pubModel":"Electronic","pubTypeList":{"pubType":["research-article","Journal Article"]},"grantsList":{"grant":[{"grantId":"20K11877","agency":"Grant-in-Aid for Scientific Research (C)","orderIn":0},{"grantId":"20K11893","agency":"Grant-in-Aid for Scientific Research (C)","orderIn":0},{"grantId":"20K11893, 20K11877","agency":"Japan Science and Technology Agency","orderIn":0}]},"keywordList":{"keyword":["Multispectral Imaging","Reflectance Estimation","Local Optimal Dataset","Mathematical Programming Method","Statistical Estimation Method","Surface-spectral Reflectance"]},"fullTextUrlList":{"fullTextUrl":[{"availability":"Subscription required","availabilityCode":"S","documentStyle":"doi","site":"DOI","url":"https://doi.org/10.3390/jimaging9020047"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"html","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC9960256"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"pdf","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC9960256?pdf=render"}]},"isOpenAccess":"Y","inEPMC":"Y","inPMC":"Y","hasPDF":"Y","hasBook":"N","hasSuppl":"N","citedByCount":1,"hasData":"N","hasReferences":"Y","hasTextMinedTerms":"Y","hasDbCrossReferences":"N","hasLabsLinks":"Y","license":"cc by","hasEvaluations":"N","authMan":"N","epmcAuthMan":"N","nihAuthMan":"N","hasTMAccessionNumbers":"N","dateOfCreation":"2023-02-24","firstIndexDate":"2023-02-25","fullTextReceivedDate":"2023-02-27","dateOfRevision":"2023-02-28","electronicPublicationDate":"2023-02-17","firstPublicationDate":"2023-02-17"}]}}
